mapper.select: SELECT e.id AS evaluatorId, e.evaluator_name AS evaluatorName, e.evaluator_type AS evaluatorType, e.description AS description, v.id AS versionId, v.version_no AS versionNo, CASE WHEN v.version_no = 0 THEN '草稿' ELSE CONCAT('V', v.version_no) END AS versionName, CASE WHEN v.version_no = 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS draft, v.model_id AS modelId, v.prompt AS prompt, v.execute_code AS executeCode, v.score_min AS scoreMin, v.score_max AS scoreMax, v.pass_threshold AS passThreshold, v.created_at AS createdAt, v.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM eval_evaluator_version v JOIN eval_evaluator e ON v.evaluator_id = e.id WHERE v.id = #{versionId} AND v.is_deleted = 0 AND e.is_deleted = 0
